description_long: This is a tall, slender shampoo bottle with a gently curved, ergonomic shape that tapers toward the base and neck. The bottle features a smooth, white body with a contrasting gold cap, which appears to be made of plastic. The front of the bottle displays the product name 'Skin Aqua Clean White' along with additional descriptive text and branding, while the back contains further product information and usage instructions. The cap is rounded and likely a screw or flip-top type, designed for easy dispensing. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative graphics aside from the printed text. The bottle is typical of personal care products found in urban environments such as bathrooms, gyms, or public restrooms.
description: A tall, slender white shampoo bottle with a gold cap and minimal printed text, featuring a smooth, curved silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with product name, branding, and detailed text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's slim profile and the full height of the gold cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional label text and product information, with the same smooth, curved shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the bottle's narrow profile and seamless transition between body and cap.
attribute_label_text: SKIN AQUA CLEAN WHITE SPF 50+ PA ++++ 25g
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and slender with a gently curved, tapered body and rounded shoulders
